word: G3365 - μηδαμῶς - mēdamōs - may-dam-oce' - Not so

sections.paragraph:
- Original: μηδαμῶς

- Transliteration: medamos

- Phonetic: may-dam-oce'

- Definition:

1. by no means

- Origin: from a compound of G3361 and amos (somebody)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Adverb from a compound of G3361 and ἀμός amos (somebody); by no means: - not so.
